title: Primer ID MiSeq Library Preparation
author: Shuntai Zhou
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.useewbe
materials: Complete thaw and vortex KAPA reagents (except for enzyme) before use.
Gel purification. (Qiagen QIAquick gel extraction kit) Run 2 nd round PCR products on 1.2% agarose gel. E = 4 V/cm, T = 60 min.
Quantification using Invitrogen Qubit dsDNA BR Assay kit. See Qubit dsDNA BR assay protocol. Don’t use Nanodrop to quantify!
Quantify the pooled library using Qubit dsDNA BR assay kit. Check the quality of the library by Agilent Bioanalyzer or Bio-rad Experion. Repeat purification if primer dimmer is present (~200bp).

steps.title: For multiplexing sequencing, first, prepare Primer Mix
steps.instruction: For multiplexing sequencing, first, prepare Primer Mix. Example (For HIV drug resistance pipeline). %s %s Make 10 µM primer mix: mix 10 µL of each primer in one set and 60 µL of dH 2 O. Primer Tables %s %s “N” in this Primer table is a random nucleotide. %s %s The 6 “N”s are not random nucleotides. They are a set of 24 pre-designed indexed sequences.

steps.title: Mix well
steps.instruction: Mix well.

steps.title: Pipette the following components into a 0
steps.instruction: Pipette the following components into a 0.5 ml RNase-free tube: %s %s undetermined, dNTPMix undetermined, cDNA primer undetermined, RNA template

steps.title: Place tube in 65°C heat block for 3-5’
steps.instruction: Place tube in 65°C heat block for 3-5’. 00:05:00, 65°C heat block

steps.title: Add the following components
steps.instruction: Add the following components: %s %s undetermined, 5x buffer undetermined, DTT undetermined, RNaseOUT undetermined, SSII RT

steps.title: Mix and incubate at 50°C for 1 hr
steps.instruction: Mix and incubate at 50°C for 1 hr. 01:00:00, Incubation at 50°C

steps.title: Increase to 55°C and incubate for 1 hr
steps.instruction: Increase to 55°C and incubate for 1 hr. 01:00:00, Incubation at 55°C

steps.title: Inactivate SSIII RT by heating at 70°C for 15’
steps.instruction: Inactivate SSIII RT by heating at 70°C for 15’. 00:15:00, Heating at 70°C

steps.title: To each tube, add 1 μl...
steps.instruction: To each tube, add 1 μl RNase H, incubate at 37°C for 20’. undetermined, RNase H 00:20:00, Incubation at 37°C

steps.title: Purify cDNA using Agencourt RNAClean XP
steps.instruction: Purify cDNA using Agencourt RNAClean XP. Resuspend the beads and take an aliquot out. Keep at room temperature for at least 30 minutes before use. (Should be in 1ml aliquots) 00:30:00, Room temperature

steps.title: Transfer the cDNA reactions into 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the cDNA reactions into 1.7 mL RNase-free tubes.

steps.title: Resuspend the beads (Vortex)
steps.instruction: Resuspend the beads (Vortex). Add 42 µl of beads to 60 µl cDNA (Ratio: 0.6 – 0.8) Agencourt RNAClean XP beads to each cDNA reaction. undetermined, beads undetermined, cDNA

steps.title: Mix the Agencourt RNAClean XP and...
steps.instruction: Mix the Agencourt RNAClean XP and sample thoroughly by pipette mixing 15 times. No vortexing . Let the tube incubate at room temperature for 20 minutes before proceeding to the next step. 00:20:00, Room temperature

steps.title: Place the tube onto the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the tube onto the magnetic tube rack for 5 minutes to separate the beads from solution. 00:05:00, Magnetic tube rack

steps.title: Slowly aspirate the cleared solution from the tube and discard
steps.instruction: Slowly aspirate the cleared solution from the tube and discard. This step should be performed while the tube is situated on the rack. Do not disturb the magnetic beads, which have formed a spot on the side of the tube.

steps.title: Dispense 500 μL of 70% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Dispense 500 μL of 70% ethanol into the tube and incubate for 30 seconds at room temperature. Aspirate out the ethanol and discard. (1/3) It is important to perform this step with the tube situated on the rack . Do not disturb the separated magnetic beads . Be sure to remove all of the ethanol from the bottom of the well as it may contain residual contaminants. 00:00:30, Incubation at room temperature

steps.title: Dispense 500 μL of 70% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Dispense 500 μL of 70% ethanol into the tube and incubate for 30 seconds at room temperature. Aspirate out the ethanol and discard. (2/3) It is important to perform this step with the tube situated on the rack . Do not disturb the separated magnetic beads . Be sure to remove all of the ethanol from the bottom of the well as it may contain residual contaminants. 00:00:30, Incubation at room temperature

steps.title: Let the reaction tube air-dry 10...
steps.instruction: Let the reaction tube air-dry 10 minutes on the rack with the cap open. The tube(s) should air-dry until the last visible traces of ethanol evaporate. Over drying the sample may result in a lower recovery. 00:10:00, Air-drying

steps.title: (Optional for clinical samples) Elute in 60 µl water
steps.instruction: (Optional for clinical samples) Elute in 60 µl water. Repeat step 12 to 19. go to step #13

steps.title: Remove the tube from the rack...
steps.instruction: Remove the tube from the rack and resuspend beads in 24 µl DNase-free water by pipetting up and down. Place tube back on the rack and leave for 3 minutes . undetermined, DNase-free water 00:03:00, Magnetic rack

steps.title: Pipette the eluant from the tube...
steps.instruction: Pipette the eluant from the tube while it is situated on the magnetic tube rack.

steps.title: %s %s Prepare mastermix in cold...
steps.instruction: %s %s Prepare mastermix in cold box and use repeater pipette to add to each tube in the cold box. Add template cDNA to each tube and pipette up and down to mix. undetermined, 5x Buffer A undetermined, Enhancer undetermined, dNTPs undetermined, Forward primer undetermined, ADPT_2a undetermined, KAPA Robust polymerase undetermined, Template cDNA

steps.title: Purify PCR products using AmpureXP PCR cleanup kits
steps.instruction: Purify PCR products using AmpureXP PCR cleanup kits. Vortex the 1 ml aliquot and remove the needed volume. Keep at room temperature for at least 30 minutes before use. 00:30:00, Room temperature

steps.title: Transfer the PCR1 reactions into 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the PCR1 reactions into 1.7 mL RNase-free tubes.

steps.title: Resuspend the beads. Add 40 µl (Ratio
steps.instruction: Resuspend the beads. Add 40 µl (Ratio: 0.6 – 0.8: 1, 36µl – 48µl) Ampure XP beads to each cDNA reaction. undetermined, Ampure XP beads

steps.title: Mix the Ampure XP and sample thoroughly by vortexing
steps.instruction: Mix the Ampure XP and sample thoroughly by vortexing . Let the tube incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes before proceeding to the next step (incube off the rack). 00:05:00, Incubation at room temperature

steps.title: Place the tube onto the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the tube onto the magnetic tube rack for 5 minutes to separate the beads from solution. 00:05:00, Incubation magnetic rack

steps.title: Slowly aspirate the cleared solution from the tube and discard
steps.instruction: Slowly aspirate the cleared solution from the tube and discard. This step should be performed while the tube is situated on the rack. Do not disturb the magnetic beads, which have formed a spot on the side of the tube.

steps.title: Dispense 500 μL of 70% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Dispense 500 μL of 70% ethanol into the tube and incubate for 30 seconds at room temperature. Aspirate out the ethanol and discard. (1/2) It is important to perform this step with the tube situated on the rack . Do not disturb the separated magnetic beads . Be sure to remove all of the ethanol from the bottom of the well as it may contain residual contaminants. undetermined, 70% ethanol 00:00:30, Incubation at room temperature

steps.title: Dispense 500 μL of 70% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Dispense 500 μL of 70% ethanol into the tube and incubate for 30 seconds at room temperature. Aspirate out the ethanol and discard. (2/2) It is important to perform this step with the tube situated on the rack . Do not disturb the separated magnetic beads . Be sure to remove all of the ethanol from the bottom of the well as it may contain residual contaminants. undetermined, 70% ethanol 00:00:30, Incubation at room temperature

steps.title: Let the reaction tube air-dry 10...
steps.instruction: Let the reaction tube air-dry 10 minutes on the rack with the cap open. The tube(s) should air-dry until the last visible traces of ethanol evaporate. Over drying the sample may result in a lower recovery. 00:10:00, Air-drying

steps.title: Remove the tube from the rack...
steps.instruction: Remove the tube from the rack and resuspend beads in 50 µl DNase-free water by pipetting up and down. Place tube back on the rack and leave for 3 minutes. undetermined, DNase-free water 00:03:00, Magnetic rack

steps.title: Pipette the 45 µl eluant from...
steps.instruction: Pipette the 45 µl eluant from the tube while it is situated on the magnetic tube rack .

steps.title: %s %s Prepare mastermix in cold...
steps.instruction: %s %s Prepare mastermix in cold box and use repeater pipette to add to each tube in the cold box. Add Indexed Adapter to each tube. undetermined, 5x KAPA HiFi Fidelity Buffer undetermined, dNTP Mix undetermined, Uni Adapter (ADPT_P1) undetermined, KAPA HiFI polymerase undetermined, Indexed Adapter undetermined, Purified template DNA undetermined, Water

steps.title: Cycle (PCR machine #5 SZ -> ILM2)
steps.instruction: Cycle (PCR machine #5 SZ -> ILM2): %s %s

steps.title: Before gel purification, run 2 µl...
steps.instruction: Before gel purification, run 2 µl products on 1% agarose gel to check the bands.

steps.title: Weight the gel; add 3 volume...
steps.instruction: Weight the gel; add 3 volume of Buffer QG to 1 volume of gel.

steps.title: Incubate at 50 ˚C for 10 minutes to completing dissolve
steps.instruction: Incubate at 50 ˚C for 10 minutes to completing dissolve. Vortex every 2-3 minutes to help dissolve. 00:10:00, Incubation at 50 ˚C 00:02:30, Vortex

steps.title: Check the color of gel solution...
steps.instruction: Check the color of gel solution (should be yellow, otherwise add 10 µl 3M sodium acetate).

steps.title: Place MinElute column, apply the sample...
steps.instruction: Place MinElute column, apply the sample to the column and centrifuge for 1 minute . 00:01:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Add 500 µl buffer QG and centrifuge for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Add 500 µl buffer QG and centrifuge for 1 minute. undetermined, Buffer QG 00:01:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Add 0
steps.instruction: Add 0.75 ml buffer PE, incubate for 5 minutes at room temperature, centrifuge for 1 minute . 00:05:00, Incubation at room temperature 00:01:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Discard the fluid, centrifuge for additional 3 minutes
steps.instruction: Discard the fluid, centrifuge for additional 3 minutes . 00:03:00, Centrifugation

steps.title: Put the column in a new 1
steps.instruction: Put the column in a new 1.7 ml tube, add 10 µl buffer EB. Stand for 4 minutes , centrifuge for 2 minutes. 00:04:00, Stand

steps.title: After quantification, pool libraries in equal amount
steps.instruction: After quantification, pool libraries in equal amount. Use AMPure XP beads to purify pooled libraries (2:3, two washes), elute in 20 to 30 µL Elution Buffer.

steps.title: Place the tube on ice for 1'
steps.instruction: Place the tube on ice for 1'. 00:01:00, on ice
